---
title: "Theodore_bites"
author: "Brian Holt"
date: "2026-05-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F,warning=F,error=F)

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```


# Load the data

```{r}
bites <- read.csv("bites.csv")

```

```{r}
colnames(bites) <- c("row_number","timestamp","food","count","liked")

bites$timestamp<- lubridate::ymd_hms(bites$timestamp)
```

```{r}

bites
str(bites)

```

# How many has he tried?

```{r}
nrow(bites)
```

# How many per day? 



```{r}
# bites %>% 
  # mutate(year=year(timestamp),
  #        month=month(timestamp),
  #        day=day(timestamp)) %>%
  # group_by(year,month,day) %>% summarise(total=sum(count)) %>% 
  # ggplot(aes(x=day,y=total))+geom_bar()
```
